rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in annex agree blocks scoped to the owning component declaration
Use assume/guarantee syntax for component type contracts, assign for implementation-level bindings
generic_rules: Component type contracts should reference visible ports and features only
Implementation contracts may use assign for output bindings when the left-hand side is an existing output or declared auxiliary variable
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Use concrete bounds or named constants in type scope assumptions and guarantees
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`
Assumptions and guarantees must be labeled with quoted identifiers
Equations and constants are declared with `eq name : type = expression;` and `const name : type = value;`
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless model exposes explicit typed ports or constants
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
